footer.tagline: An enclave of tranquility in the quiet north of Bali, dedicated to the art of slowing down.
footer.copyright: © {year} Bhumi Lovina Residence. All rights reserved.

home.hero: A Private Sanctuary in North Bali
home.heroCopy: Eight villas carved into the quiet coastline of Lovina — a slow, considered retreat between the Bali Sea and the island's oldest mountains.
home.estateHeadline: Eight villas. One quiet stretch of North Bali. A slower kind of luxury.
home.estateCopy: Bhumi Lovina is a private estate of five Deluxe Villas, two Suite Villas, and a signature Executive Residence. Each villa is its own world — a still pool, a hand-carved bed, a shaded verandah — held together by the sound of the Bali Sea.
home.villaHeadline: Spaces designed for a single, quiet breath.
home.expCopy: From the rhythmic dance of dolphins at dawn to the hidden whispers of jungle waterfalls, we curate moments that transcend the ordinary.
home.dolphinCopy: A private, ethical journey on a traditional Balinese boat at first light.
home.waterfallCopy: Gitgit, Sekumpul, Aling-Aling — the island's best-kept secrets.
home.snorkelCopy: Private snorkeling trips to the pristine reefs of Menjangan.
home.templeCopy: Ulun Danu Beratan and the quiet village temples of Buleleng.
home.neighborhoodHeadline: The best restaurants in Lovina, a short walk away.
home.neighborhoodCopy: Where to eat in North Bali — a curated short-list of the cafes, seafood restaurants, and markets we send our guests to, walking distance or a short drive from the estate.
home.arrivingCopy: Nestled on the slopes overlooking the Bali Sea, Bhumi Lovina offers a secluded escape while remaining connected to the island's natural wonders.
home.bookHeadline: Reserve directly, or through our trusted partners.
home.bookCopy: The best rate is always on WhatsApp, direct with our villa host.

villas.headline: Eight villas. One quiet estate.
villas.deluxeIntro: One bedroom. One plunge pool. A single, considered line between your bed and the Bali Sea.
villas.suiteIntro: Two bedrooms arranged around a private pool — ideal for two couples or a small family.
villas.execIntro: Three bedrooms, a private infinity pool, a dedicated villa host — the estate's signature residence.

villa.reserveCopy: For the best rate and a personal reply, message us directly on WhatsApp. You can also reserve through our trusted partners below.
villa.bookPrefill: Hi, I would like to book {name} at Bhumi Lovina Residence

experiences.headline: Things to do in North Bali
experiences.heroCopy: A curated short-list of the quieter things to do in Lovina and the north — from sunrise dolphin tours to hidden waterfalls.
experiences.nearbyHeadline: Where to eat in North Bali
experiences.nearbyCopy: The best restaurants, cafes, and markets in Lovina — the short-list we actually send to our guests.
experiences.questionsHeadline: A quiet guide to the north.
experiences.faq1q: Is the Lovina dolphin tour ethical?
experiences.faq1a: Our dolphin tour uses a single traditional jukung per guest group, with engines cut early and a respectful distance kept from the pods. We time trips to avoid the main crowded runs. No dolphin is ever fed, touched, or chased.
experiences.faq2q: What are the best waterfalls in North Bali?
experiences.faq2a: Gitgit is the closest and most iconic. Sekumpul, often called the most beautiful waterfall in Indonesia, is about an hour inland. Aling-Aling has natural rock slides and deep jumping pools for the more adventurous.
experiences.faq3q: Can we snorkel directly from the estate?
experiences.faq3a: The Lovina house reef is a 2-minute drive from the estate. For pristine reef, we run private half-day boats to Menjangan Island, a protected marine national park.
experiences.faq4q: How far is Bhumi Lovina from Ngurah Rai Airport?
experiences.faq4a: Approximately 3 hours by private car. We can arrange airport transfer, including a mid-route stop at a temple or café of your choice.

book.headline: Book Your Stay
book.directHeadline: WhatsApp is the best rate, always.
book.directCopy: Message our villa host directly and we'll reply with availability, a made-to-measure itinerary, and a quiet personal answer to every question.
book.otaCopy: Available on our preferred booking partners. Rates may be slightly higher than the direct WhatsApp rate.
book.checkinNote: Early arrival available on request, subject to availability.
book.checkoutNote: Late check-out charged at IDR 55,000/hour when the next arrival allows.
book.transferNote: Private airport transfer can be arranged for all bookings; ~3 h.

info.headline: Everything you need to know.
info.heroCopy: Facilities, policies, check-in details, and house rules — all in one place so you can arrive with ease.
info.aboutHeadline: Eight private villas. One uninterrupted sea.
info.aboutCopy: Each of our eight villas is an entirely self-contained retreat — two bedrooms, a private pool, and a fully equipped kitchen. No shared corridors, no lobby distractions. Just the sound of water and the Bali Sea beyond the palms.
info.facilitiesCopy: All villa types share the same core facilities. The only distinction between types is noted below.
info.rulesHeadline: A few things to keep in mind.
info.lateCheckoutBody: Charged at IDR 55,000 per hour beyond the 11:00 check-out time.
info.damagesBody: Any damage caused by guests will be assessed and charged accordingly.
info.lostItemsBody: Bhumi Lovina Residence & Villas is not responsible for items lost or missing during your stay.
info.villaUpgradesBody: Room type upgrades must be confirmed directly with our reservations team before arrival.
info.noisePolicyBody: Please keep music at a considerate volume so as not to disturb other guests across the estate.
info.reschedulingBody: Rescheduling requests must be submitted at least 7 days before your scheduled arrival date. Requests made within 7 days cannot be accommodated.
info.cancellationBody: All reservations are non-refundable. We recommend arranging travel insurance to protect against unforeseen circumstances.
info.ctaHeadline: Questions? Our team is on WhatsApp.
info.ctaCopy: The best rate is always direct. Reach our villa host for availability, custom requests, or anything not covered here.
info.ctaPrefill: Hi, I have a question about Bhumi Lovina Residence
